alkylation reagent: alkylation with 100 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature in the dark for 1 h.
cleavage agent: incubated 4 h with trypsin (1:20 weight/weight) at 37 °C.
fragmentation method: Higher-energy collisional dissociation was used to produce fragmented peptides.
instrument: the MS/MS analyses were conducted using either an Q Exactive Plus Orbitrap (QE) or a Fusion Lumos Orbitrap (Lumos) mass spectrometer.
